name: masumi-payment-service
description: A Payment service for MASUMI AI Nodes
author: NMKR
_meshsdk_pin_note: DO NOT BUMP without ADR 0005. Root + V1 packages MUST stay on @meshsdk/core@1.9.0-beta.96 and @meshsdk/core-cst@1.9.0-beta.90. V2 has its own mesh line in packages/payment-source-v2. See docs/adr/0005-meshsdk-version-pinning-v1-v2.md and CLAUDE.md > Mesh SDK version isolation.
_meshsdk_devdep_note: @meshsdk/core + @meshsdk/core-cst are in devDependencies (NOT dependencies) ON PURPOSE. pkgroll externalizes `dependencies` as bare specifiers; if mesh were external, the production bundle (dist/) would resolve ONE mesh version from the root node_modules at runtime, collapsing V2's beta.102 onto the V1 beta.96 line and deriving the WRONG V2 script address. Keeping mesh in devDependencies makes pkgroll BUNDLE it per-importer, so V1 source inlines beta.96 and V2 source inlines its own beta.102 (from packages/payment-source-v2/node_modules). Do NOT move these back to dependencies. See docs/adr/0005-meshsdk-version-pinning-v1-v2.md.

scripts.preinstall: node -e "if (!(process.env.npm_config_user_agent||'').startsWith('pnpm')) { console.error('\nThis project uses pnpm. Use: pnpm install\n'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.postinstall: test -f prisma/prisma.config.ts && pnpm run prisma:generate || true
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:backend && pnpm -C frontend run lint
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm run lint:backend:fix && pnpm -C frontend run lint:fix
scripts.lint-ci: pnpm run lint:backend && pnpm -C frontend run lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:backend && pnpm run typecheck:frontend
scripts.format: prettier --log-level silent --write "src/**/*.{ts,js}" "packages/**/src/**/*.{ts,js}" && pnpm -C frontend run format
scripts.prisma:migrate: pnpm exec prisma migrate deploy --config prisma/prisma.config.ts
scripts.prisma:migrate:dev: pnpm exec prisma migrate dev --config prisma/prisma.config.ts
scripts.prisma:migrate:reset: pnpm exec prisma migrate reset --config prisma/prisma.config.ts
scripts.prisma:seed: pnpm exec prisma db seed --config prisma/prisma.config.ts
scripts.build: pnpm exec prisma generate && tsc --noEmit && pkgroll
scripts.check:unused: pnpm run knip && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --noUnusedLocals --noUnusedParameters && pnpm -C frontend exec tsc --noEmit --noUnusedLocals --noUnusedParameters
